subject: Three humanoid figures in outlaw attire fight each other at the entrance to a massive vault door in a desert setting
description: Three figures in western outlaw attire face off in a sandy arena before a colossal circular vault door that fills the background. The vault door features an enormous engraved geometric medallion or mandala design and radiates an eerie green magical energy. The figure on the left wears a wide-brimmed hat with feathers; the figure on the right is lean with long dark hair and a whip or lasso; the smaller central figure dashes between them. All three appear to be in combat or confrontational postures. The sandy ground and the scale of the vault door relative to the figures emphasize the enormity of what they were trying to steal.
foreground: Three outlaw figures in combat stances on sandy ground
background: Massive circular vault door with geometric medallion design, green magical energy emanating
emotion: Explosive betrayal — figures in aggressive confrontation, greed overcoming loyalty
